cockatrice_carddatabase.cards:
Hunt Rathalos
R 2RR 4 Legendary Battle - Hunt Battle front R 4
YPE Rathalos, King of the Skies 1 1 At the beginning of each players upkeep, Hunt: Rathalos deals 3 damage to that player. Carve 3 (When this battle is defeated, each player that had a source they control deal damage to it creates 3 treasure tokens.)
Rathalos, King of the Skies
R back
0 Legendary Creature - Dragon Creature 4/4 back R
YPE Hunt Rathalos 2 Flying

YPE Hunt Rathian 2 Toxic 1 (Players dealt combat damage by this creature also get a poison counter.)
Hunt Deviljho
BRG 3BRG 6 Legendary Battle - Hunt Battle front BRG 7
YPE Picklejho, Endless Hunger 1 1 Ward— Sacrifice a creature (Whenever this permanent becomes the target of a spell or ability an opponent controls, counter it unless that player Sacrifice a creature.) At the beginning of each players upkeep, that player faces a villainous choice — Hunt: Deviljho deals 5 damage to that player or that player sacrifices a creature and puts 2 defense counters on Hunt: Deviljho. Carve 3
Picklejho, Endless Hunger
BRG
0 Legendary Creature - Dinosaur Creature 5/6 back BRG
YPE Hunt Deviljho 2 When a Creature Dies, if ‘twas dealt damage by Picklejho this turn, put two +1/+1 counters on Picklejho.

UR 3UR 5 Legendary Battle - Hunt Battle front UR 5
YPE Rey Dau, Electric Spear 1 1 At the beginning of each players upkeep, Hunt: Rey Dau deals 3 damage to that player. Tap the creature with the highest toughness among creatures that player controls, then put a stun counter on it. Carve 3.

UR
0 Legendary Creature - Dragon Creature 4/4 back UR
YPE Hunt Rey Dau 2 Flying When Rey Dau attacks, it deals 3 damage to any target.

YPE Zinogre, Lord of Lightning 1 1 At the beginning of each players upkeep, Hunt: Zinogre deals 2 damage to that player and taps an untapped creature with the highest mana value among creatures they control, then puts a stun counter on it. Carve 3

WU
0 Legendary Creature - Dog Beast Creature 4/4 back WU
YPE Hunt Zinogre 2 When Zinogre attacks, draw a card for each tapped creature defending player controls. When this creature becomes blocked, tap the blocking creature and put a stun counter on it.
Hunt Brachydios
G 3GG 5 Legendary Battle - Hunt Battle front G 5
YPE Brachydios, the Crushing Wyvern 1 1 At the beginning of each players upkeep, Hunt: Brachydios deals 1 damage to that player, then that player creates a green artifact token named Slime with cumulative upkeep 1 and “When this artifact leaves the battlefield, it deals 3 damage its controller.” (At the beginning of your upkeep, put an age counter on this permanent, then sacrifice it unless you pay its upkeep cost for each age counter on it.) Carve 3
Brachydios, the Crushing Wyvern
G
0 Legendary Creature - Ooze Dinosaur Creature 3/5 back G
YPE Hunt Brachydios 2 When Brachydios attacks, defending player creates a green artifact token named Slime with cumulative upkeep {1} and “When this artifact leaves the battlefield, it deals 3 damage to its controller.” (At the beginning of your upkeep, put an age counter on this creature, then sacrifice it unless you pay its upkeep cost for each age counter on it.)
Hunt Gore Magala
B 5BB 7 Legendary Battle - Hunt Battle front B 7
YPE Gore Magala, Dark Eclipse 1 1 Shroud At the beginning of each player’s upkeep, Hunt: Gore Magala deals 1 damage to that player, then if that player has less than 5 frenzy counters, they gain a frenzy counter unless that player pays 3 or U. (If a player deals 10 combat damage in a turn, remove all frenzy counters from that player and draw a card. If a player has 5 or more frenzy counters, combat damage dealt to them is doubled.) Carve 3
Gore Magala, Dark Eclipse
B
0 Legendary Creature - Nightmare Dragon // Legendary Creature - Elder Dragon Creature back B 5/7 // 10/10
YPE Hunt Gore Magala 2 When Gore Magala transforms, for each of up to three target creatures, create a colourless Frenzied Role token attached to that creature. (Enchanted creature gets +1/+1 and is goaded. When enchanted creature deals combat damage to a player, that player gets a frenzy counter.) {T}: Target player gets a frenzy counter. If that player has 5 or more frenzy counters, flip Gore Magala. --- Flying, Indestructible If a source would deal damage to a player with 5 or more frenzy counters, it deals double that damage instead.

Palico
WUBRG 3WUBRG 8 Legendary Creature - Cat Ally Creature 2/3 front WUBRG
YPE 2 The Hunter’s Companion - Your deck contains up to 1 creature card. (If this card is your chosen companion, you may put it into your hand from outside the game for {3} any time you could cast a sorcery.) At the beginning of your end step, if you control a commander and it is tapped, gain 2 health. If it is untapped, put a +1/+1 counter on up to two target creatures. If you would lose the game for the first time, instead your life total becomes 5 and you lose all poison counters. Until end of turn, you have hexproof, you can’t lose the game and your opponents can’t win the game, and all damage that would reduce your life total below 1 is prevented.

WUBRG 4WUBRG 9 Legendary Battle - Hunt Battle front WUBRG
YPE Alatreon, The Blazing Black Dragon 1 1 Indestructible At the beginning of each players upkeep that player pays mana equal to that players devotion to white, otherwise destroy each land they control. that player also, • Mills cards equal to their devotion to blue. • Loses life equal to their devotion to black. • Sacrifices non-creature permanents equal to their devotion to red. • Sacrifices creatures equal to their devotion to green. Carve 3, This card can be your commander.
Alatreon, The Blazing Black Dragon
WUBRG
0 Legendary Creature - Elder Dragon Creature 4/4 back WUBRG
YPE Hunt Alatreon 2 If you would gain life, gain that much life plus your devotion to white instead. If you would draw a card, draw that many cards plus your devotion to blue instead. Whenever you lose life, each opponent loses life equal to your devotion to black. Whenever you take damage, Alatreon deals damage to any target equal to your devotion to red. Alatreon has +X/+X where X is your devotion to green.
